title: Join the [Organization] Circle
hook: The steady few who show up every month — so [the people you serve] never face it alone.
intro: The [Organization] Circle is our community of monthly donors. Your recurring gift funds [the core programs your mission depends on] — the steady, year-round work that one-time gifts can't sustain. Not just once. Every month.

become.label: When you join, you become
become.body: one of the reliable few this mission can count on — not a one-time gift, but a standing promise. [The people you serve] know the Circle is there because you are.

impact.amountLabel: given together each month by Circle members
impact.body: Sustained monthly giving lets us staff programs year-round, respond the moment someone reaches out, and plan ahead — the kind of stability one-time gifts can't provide.

tiersTitle: Find your place in the circle

tiers.name: Supporter
tiers.desc: Every month, covers [one small, concrete need].

tiers.name: Sustainer
tiers.desc: Each month, sustains [an ongoing outcome for someone you serve].

tiers.name: Anchor
tiers.desc: Month after month, anchors [a bigger commitment — a program or a place].

benefits.title: Every Circle member receives
items: A personal welcome from the [Organization] team.
A monthly dispatch — real stories and updates from inside the work.
An annual invitation to see your impact in person.
The knowledge that you are part of what keeps this mission going.

voice.quote: Quote a monthly donor here — in their own words, why they give every month. Specific and personal beats polished.
voice.attribution: Member name, Circle member since YYYY

cta.label: Join the Circle
cta.note: Start, change, or pause your monthly gift anytime.

teaser.title: Be one of the people this mission counts on.
teaser.body: Join the [Organization] Circle — monthly donors who show up every month, not just once.
teaser.note: Start, change, or pause your monthly gift anytime.
